title: adonis annua subsp. cupaniana
intro: Adonis annua subsp. cupaniana, also known as the Sicilian adonis or cupan's anemone, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the Anemone genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Adonis annua subsp. cupaniana include alleviating coughs, bronchitis, and asthma symptoms, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Adonis annua subsp. cupaniana typically involve drying and processing the roots and rhizomes, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
